log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goblin — Armored Tank (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 11 damage. Goblin — Armored Tank HP: 48/59

--- Goblin — Armored Tank --- HP: 48/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
